calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-29-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Herbert Donaldson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Ron Sinclair.
Michael Rossoff, Esq., for Plaintiff TNDC, Tom Truong manager also present.
Defendant, Darryl Lincoln present in pro per.
Parties reached a settlement by written stipulation.
Signed by the parties and read into the record.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
Stipulation for judgment filed ( see scanned document).
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
